task_completion.description: Delete the obsolete 'Annual Performance Review - Frank Rivera' event from the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the calendar view with the 'Annual Performance Review - Frank Rivera' event being deleted (e.g., clicking delete on the event popup) or its absence from the calendar where it previously existed.

task_completion.description: Create a new event titled 'Performance Review Calibration'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Odoo calendar event creation form or saved event detail view showing the title 'Performance Review Calibration'.

task_completion.description: Add Frank Rivera, Grace Patel, and Henry Kim as attendees to the new event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Attendees' field in the event form contains tags or entries for Frank Rivera, Grace Patel, and Henry Kim.

task_completion.description: Set the new event to recur monthly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Recurrent' checkbox is checked and the recurrence rules are set to 'Monthly' (or 'Repeat Every 1 Month') in the event options tab.

task_completion.description: Include an agenda covering calibration methodology, promotion nominations, and compensation review in the event description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' or 'Notes' field of the event contains text explicitly mentioning 'calibration methodology', 'promotion nominations', and 'compensation review'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo Calendar UI (http://localhost:8069), not terminal commands, python scripts, or API tools.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo event creation modals and forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo event form fields (Summary, Attendees, Options, Description) being actively filled out.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the required information into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final result is a saved calendar event in Odoo, not a text document or notes app containing the event details.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The new event must be titled exactly 'Performance Review Calibration'. The event to delete is exactly 'Annual Performance Review - Frank Rivera'. The required recurrence is 'monthly'. The required attendees are Frank Rivera, Grace Patel, and Henry Kim. The description must include an agenda covering calibration methodology, promotion nominations, and compensation review.
